summary: Tested new 'gestor_desportivo' (Sports Manager) role with same permissions as admin. All 8 features tested and working correctly. Fixed missing role name translation in getRoleName() utility function.

gestor_desportivo_login.verified: Login with gestor@example.com / test123456 redirects to dashboard

club_menu_visible.description: gestor_desportivo sees Club menu in sidebar

subscription_menu_visible.description: gestor_desportivo sees Subscription menu in sidebar

club_settings_access.description: gestor_desportivo can access Club settings page
club_settings_access.verified: Navigation to /club works, Edit button visible

subscription_access.verified: Navigation to /subscription works, subscription details visible

edit_club_button.description: gestor_desportivo can edit club details (Edit button visible)

role_name_translation.description: Role name displays correctly in translations
role_name_translation.verified: Sidebar shows 'Gestor Desportivo' instead of raw 'gestor_desportivo'
role_name_translation.fix_applied: Added gestor_desportivo and treinador_adjunto to getRoleName() in utils.js

critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN_ROLES array correctly includes both 'admin' and 'gestor_desportivo'
is_admin_role() function correctly checks role membership in ADMIN_ROLES
Sidebar correctly filters admin-only links using effectiveRole check
Backend permissions.py correctly defines ADMIN_LEVEL_ROLES with Role.SPORTS_MANAGER
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/lib/utils.js - Added gestor_desportivo and treinador_adjunto to getRoleName()
context_for_next_testing_agent: New role 'gestor_desportivo' (Sports Manager) fully tested. Has same permissions as admin. Account: gestor@example.com / test123456. All admin features accessible: Club, Subscription, Members, Teams, Payments. Role name translation fixed in utils.js.
